hasAttributes.name: businessUnitId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the business unit.

hasAttributes.name: organizationId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the organization associated with the business unit.

hasAttributes.name: name
hasAttributes.description: Name of the business unit.

hasAttributes.name: description
hasAttributes.description: Description of the business unit.

hasAttributes.name: divisionName
hasAttributes.description: Name of the division to which the business unit belongs.

hasAttributes.name: fileAsName
hasAttributes.description: Alternative name under which the business unit can be filed.

hasAttributes.name: tickerSymbol
hasAttributes.description: Stock exchange ticker symbol for the business unit.

hasAttributes.name: stockExchange
hasAttributes.description: Stock exchange on which the business is listed.

hasAttributes.name: UTCOffset
hasAttributes.description: UTC offset for the business unit. This is the difference between local time and standard Coordinated Universal Time.

hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the business unit was created.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the business unit was last modified.

hasAttributes.name: creditLimit
hasAttributes.description: Credit limit for the business unit.

hasAttributes.name: costCenter
hasAttributes.description: Name of the business unit cost center.

hasAttributes.name: webSiteUrl
hasAttributes.description: Website URL for the business unit.

hasAttributes.name: ftpSiteUrl
hasAttributes.description: FTP site URL for the business unit.

hasAttributes.name: emailAddress
hasAttributes.description: Email address for the business unit.

hasAttributes.name: inheritanceMask
hasAttributes.description: Inheritance mask for the business unit.

hasAttributes.name: createdBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who created the business unit.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who last modified the business unit.

hasAttributes.name: workflowSuspended
hasAttributes.description: Information about whether workflow or sales process rules have been suspended.

hasAttributes.name: parentBusinessUnitId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for the parent business unit.

hasAttributes.name: isDisabled
hasAttributes.description: Information about whether the business unit is enabled or disabled.

hasAttributes.name: disabledReason
hasAttributes.description: Reason for disabling the business unit.

hasAttributes.name: versionNumber
hasAttributes.description: Version number of the business unit.

hasAttributes.name: address1AddressId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for address 1.

hasAttributes.name: address1AddressTypeCode
hasAttributes.description: Type of address for address 1, such as billing, shipping, or primary address.

hasAttributes.name: address1Name
hasAttributes.description: Name to enter for address 1.

hasAttributes.name: address1Line1
hasAttributes.description: First line for entering address 1 information.

hasAttributes.name: address1Line2

hasAttributes.name: address1Line3

hasAttributes.name: address1City

hasAttributes.description: State or province for address 1.

hasAttributes.name: address1County
hasAttributes.description: County name for address 1.

hasAttributes.name: address1Country
hasAttributes.description: Country/region name for address 1.

hasAttributes.name: address1PostOfficeBox
hasAttributes.description: Post office box number for address 1.

hasAttributes.name: address1PostalCode
hasAttributes.description: ZIP Code or postal code for address 1.

hasAttributes.name: address1UTCOffset
hasAttributes.description: UTC offset for address 1. This is the difference between local time and standard Coordinated Universal Time.

hasAttributes.name: address1UPSZone
hasAttributes.description: United Parcel Service (UPS) zone for address 1.

hasAttributes.name: address1Latitude

hasAttributes.description: First telephone number associated with address 1.

hasAttributes.description: Longitude for address 1.

hasAttributes.description: Method of shipment for address 1.

hasAttributes.name: address1Telephone2
hasAttributes.description: Second telephone number associated with address 1.

hasAttributes.name: address1Telephone3
hasAttributes.description: Third telephone number associated with address 1.

hasAttributes.name: address1Fax
hasAttributes.description: Fax number for address 1.

definitions.description: Business, division, or department in the Microsoft Dynamics 365 database.
